summary: Frontend-only testing of Cases page 7 sector cards and Tool page construction sector. All 20+ test cases passed (100%). Cases page displays 7 sector cards in 3+3+1 grid layout with icons, titles, descriptions, outputs, and 'Assess readiness' links. Tool page shows all 7 sectors with tightened/compact layout, Construction & Infrastructure sector works correctly in both EN and FR. Full tool workflow tested successfully.

issues: Sector cards in Cases.js are hardcoded in English and do not use French translations - only the page title 'Études de cas' translates to French. This may be intentional as sector card content is static marketing copy.

passed_tests: Cases page loads successfully with data-testid='cases-page'
'Sectors We Serve' heading is present
All 7 sector cards found: Regulated Systems, Enterprise SaaS, Procurement & Vendor Risk, Public Sector, Financial Systems, Construction & Infrastructure, Governance Operating Model
Sector cards use 3-column grid layout (md:grid-cols-3)
Each sector card contains: icon, title, subtitle, body text, Outputs section, 'Assess readiness' link
Construction & Infrastructure card has correct content: 'Jobsite safety' description, 'Safety governance, equipment AI controls' deliverable
Sector cards are vertical rectangles with appropriate width (~331px)
Tool page loads successfully with data-testid='tool-page'
Step 1 sector selection shows all 7 sectors
Construction & Infrastructure sector selectable and shows selected state styling
Next button enables after sector selection
Successfully proceeds from Step 1 to Step 2 (readiness questions)
Tool page uses compact container width (420px max)
Tool page uses compact text styling (text-xs)
French translations work on Tool page: 'Choisissez votre secteur', 'SECTEUR', 'PRÉPARATION'
Construction sector French translation correct: 'Sécurité de chantier, suivi des actifs'
Full tool workflow: Select Construction → Answer 8 questions → View results → Close drawer
Results drawer shows sector name, score percentage, risk level, score breakdown, recommended steps
All 7 sector card 'Assess readiness' links navigate to /tool
Case Studies section present with clickable cards that open drawer
critical_code_review_comments: Cases.js sector cards content is hardcoded in English (sectorCards array) and not using translation system - this is noted but may be intentional design choice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cases page now has 7 sector cards: Regulated Systems, Enterprise SaaS, Procurement & Vendor Risk, Public Sector, Financial Systems, Construction & Infrastructure, Governance Operating Model. Cards are in 3+3+1 grid layout. Tool page shows all 7 sectors with compact/tightened layout (420px max width, text-xs styling). Construction sector has French translation: 'Sécurité de chantier, suivi des actifs, intelligence des équipements et automatisation opérationnelle'. Note: Sector cards in Cases.js are hardcoded in English.
